artifact.content_preview:
From: noc-team@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: Network Operations Centre — Monitoring Tooling Question
Date: March 7, 2026

Hi Alice,

During our review of the Site A migration runbook, our NOC team raised
a question that we wanted to flag to the project.

Currently, the NOC uses SolarWinds NPM for network monitoring across all
GC infrastructure. As part of the Catalyst 9500 switch deployment, we
will need to ensure that the new switches are properly onboarded into
the SolarW

extracted_tasks.text: Determine if the SolarWinds NPM upgrade should be included in NGIS Phase 3 or handled separately.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Should the NPM upgrade be included as part of the NGIS Phase 3 network migration activities? Or should it be handled separately?

extracted_tasks.text: Onboard new Catalyst 9500 switches into the SolarWinds platform with polling intervals and alert thresholds.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: we will need to ensure that the new switches are properly onboarded into the SolarWinds platform

extracted_tasks.text: Upgrade SolarWinds NPM module to version 2024.1 to support Catalyst 9500 platform.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: SolarWinds' support for the Catalyst 9500 platform requires upgrading the NPM module to version 2024.1

metadata.subject: Network Operations Centre — Monitoring Tooling Question

alerts.detected_ask: Upgrading the SolarWinds NPM module to version 2024.1, including configuration and database schema changes.
alerts.baseline_reference: OUT OF SCOPE: Network monitoring tool upgrades
alerts.suggested_action: Reject the inclusion of the NPM upgrade in the current project scope. llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "alignment_score": 0.2,
  "drift_type": "scope_expansion",
  "detected_ask": "Upgrading the SolarWinds NPM module to version 2024.1, including configuration and database schema changes.",
  "baseline_reference": "OUT OF SCOPE: Network monitoring tool upgrades",
  "suggested_action": "Reject the inclusion of the NPM upgrade in the current project scope. Direct the NOC team to initiate a separate internal maintenance task or Change Request (CR) through the SSC Project Change Management Process if they wish to seek additional funding/time, while emphasizing the existing 'Out of Scope' exclusion.",
  "reasoning": "The request directly contradicts the 'OUT OF SCOPE' section of the baseline, which explicitly excludes 'Network monitoring tool upgrades.' While the onboarding of new switches (configuration) is a standard migration activity, the underlying software version upgrade and database schema changes for the monitoring platform itself constitute a tool upgrade. Given the project is nearing its April 2026 Go-Live constraint, adding infrastructure software upgrades introduces significant risk to the schedule and budget."
}
```

parsed_json.detected_ask: Upgrading the SolarWinds NPM module to version 2024.1, including configuration and database schema changes.

parsed_json.suggested_action: Reject the inclusion of the NPM upgrade in the current project scope. Direct the NOC team to initiate a separate internal maintenance task or Change Request (CR) through the SSC Project Change Management Process if they wish to seek additional funding/time, while emphasizing the existing 'Out of Scope' exclusion.
parsed_json.reasoning: The request directly contradicts the 'OUT OF SCOPE' section of the baseline, which explicitly excludes 'Network monitoring tool upgrades.' While the onboarding of new switches (configuration) is a standard migration activity, the underlying software version upgrade and database schema changes for the monitoring platform itself constitute a tool upgrade. Given the project is nearing its April 2026 Go-Live constraint, adding infrastructure software upgrades introduces significant risk to the schedule and budget.
